rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly revised the draft, ensuring logical consistency by adding specific details and addressing all parts of the argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Every claim was audited against evidence, with additions like raw counts and removal of unsupported claims, showing strong alignment.
rationale.R1.6: Significant improvements in prose clarity and professionalism indicate a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainties were clearly marked, especially regarding cadence testing, with confidence levels provided for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed strictly within the agreed scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; instead, the agent identified and mitigated potential issues in the original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with clear sources and reasons, ensuring full traceability.
